name: Recruiter: Bulk-message a project (SENDS InMail)
description: SENDS a bulk InMail to ALL active candidates in a project pipeline. ⚠️ Actually sends + burns InMail credits + cannot be undone. KEY QUIRK (bulk composer): the subject input is HIDDEN until a Send attempt validates it — so the flow types the body, clicks Send once (harmlessly blocked = reveals the now-visible subject field), types the subject, then Sends for real. Flow: pipeline → select-all → Message → type body → Send#1 (reveal) → type subject → Send#2 (send). Params: pipeline URL (step 1), body (step 12), subject (step 18). Selectors (live 2026-06-08): select-all input.small-input; bulk btn [data-test-action='send-message']; body .ql-editor[contenteditable]; subject [data-test-compose-subject-input]; Send aria 'Send this message'/'Enviar este mensaje'.

steps.value: Hola, ¡espero que estés muy bien! Te escribo desde Akurey porque tu perfil nos llamó la atención para una posición que tenemos abierta. ¿Te interesaría que conversemos? ¡Saludos!

selector_chain.value: Compose a message or draft with AI

steps.intent: Send #1 — validates + REVEALS the subject field (blocked, no send)
